components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(37,99,235,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
components.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow
components.header: fixed w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100/50
components.inputs: w-full rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

visual_enhancers.shadows: soft, diffused ambient shadows. No harsh black drops.
visual_enhancers.animations: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for services, subtle scale on hover

images.description: Friendly dentist consultation, reassuring patient in modern clinic
Clean, modern, and state-of-the-art medical clinic interior
Smiling young woman holding toothbrush, showing healthy teeth
Man smiling during a dental checkup
images.placement: Why Choose Us or General Care Page

pages_and_features: Homepage (hero, intro, services overview, why choose us, testimonials, contact CTA)
About Us page (dentist intro, qualifications, approach)
Services page (10 dental services with descriptions, benefits, CTAs)
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Start by building the shared components (Header, Footer, Button, Card).
2. For the Hero section, use a split layout (text left, image right) or a full-width image with an offset overlapping card.
3. Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1, H2, and H3 headings to convey premium elegance. Use Manrope for body text.
4. Add Lucide icons to the Services section (e.g., Smile, Sparkles, Syringe, ShieldCheck) and wrap them in a soft blue circular background.
5. Ensure generous padding (`py-24`) between sections to create a calm, uncluttered feel.
6. Build the Services page with a Bento Grid layout to display the 10 services distinctively without looking like a generic list.
7. Implement Shadcn's Accordion for the FAQ section and style it to match the clean medical aesthetic.
8. Use customized Shadcn inputs for the Contact Form.
9. DO NOT use placeholder images. Rely ENTIRELY on the URLs provided in the `media` array.
10. Make sure to add `data-testid` to all interactive elements for testability.
